properties.name: Apo Reef Natural Park
properties.interimNote: This is a 4-corner legislated bounding rectangle (5 vertices incl. closing point, ~158 km²) derived from Senate Bill 2393 official boundaries as recorded in OpenStreetMap. Both the inner core (way 181365709) and the outer buffer zone (way 181365710) in OSM are identical bounding rectangles — no detailed coastline polygon exists in OSM for this protected area. The authoritative precise boundary is available from WDPA ID 2340 via the Protected Planet API (https://api.protectedplanet.net/v3/protected_areas/2340), which requires an API token. Run scripts/fetch-apo-reef-wdpa.ts once a token is available to replace this file with the authoritative polygon.
properties.pendingAuthoritativeSource: WDPA ID 2340 via Protected Planet API — token pending (PP_TOKEN env var)
